name: Double Corn Brunch Bake (Ovo Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, cook the onions in oil, stirring occasionally, until tender (4 to 5 minutes).
2. Meanwhile, drain the corn and reserve the liquid. Add water to the liquid to make 1 cup.
3. Add the liquid mixture and cornmeal to the onions. Cook and stir until the mixture boils.
4. Remove from heat and thoroughly blend in the milk, eggs, and corn.
5. In a small bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir into the cornmeal mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean (25 to 30 minutes).
8. Top with salsa to taste. To serve, cut into squares.
